name: Dashen Bank Share Company
regulator: National Bank of Ethiopia / Ethiopian Securities Exchange
industry_analysis: Private banks with strong deposit franchises and recognizable brands are likely to be among the deeper pools of future Ethiopian public issuers. The sector remains competitive, but listing progress is concentrated among stronger institutions with governance and scale.
financial_analysis: Dashen appears to be further along than most private issuers because ESX publicly confirmed completion of its registration process and approval in principle toward listing. Until the final listing is complete and more filing history is available, valuation and liquidity should still be treated as provisional.

assets.name: Dashen Bank shareholding interest
assets.transaction_costs: Current costs depend on issuer-approved transfer mechanics, documentation, and any intermediary charges. Public-market fees should become clearer after final listing.
assets.purchase_procedure: Before listing, investors should verify transferability and issuer procedures. After listing, purchase should move to approved ESX intermediaries and standard investor-account workflows.
assets.eligibility_requirements: Depends on current transfer rules before listing and standard KYC after listing.

sources.title: ESX welcomes Dashen Bank's progress toward planned listing
sources.excerpt: ESX says Dashen completed its registration process and received approval in principle toward listing, subject to remaining requirements.

sources.title: Dashen Bank official website
sources.excerpt: Used for issuer identity and institutional reference.

name: Wegagen Bank Share Company
regulator: National Bank of Ethiopia / Ethiopian Securities Exchange
industry_analysis: Banking is one of the first sectors to reach Ethiopia's formal public market. Regulation, deposit franchise economics, and branch-driven customer acquisition create high barriers to entry, while market liberalization and digital payments reforms continue to deepen the sector.
financial_analysis: Wegagen is already on the ESX Main Market, which improves disclosure relative to most Ethiopian issuers. Financial assessment should still lean on the posted annual and interim reports because live market-price depth remains limited in the early ESX period.

assets.name: Wegagen Bank ordinary shares (WGBX)
assets.transaction_costs: Use a licensed ESX trading member. Costs will typically include brokerage/intermediation fees and any exchange or custody charges applied by the intermediary.
assets.purchase_procedure: Open an investment account through an approved ESX intermediary, complete KYC, fund the account, and place an order for WGBX once market access is available.
assets.eligibility_requirements: Investor account, KYC, and access through an authorized market intermediary.

sources.title: ESX profile for Wegagen Bank Share Company
sources.excerpt: ESX lists Wegagen Bank as WGBX on the Main Market with listing date January 10, 2025.

sources.title: ESX listed companies page
sources.excerpt: Listed capital, listed shares, number of shareholders, and business classification are published on the ESX listed companies page.

name: Gadaa Bank Share Company
regulator: National Bank of Ethiopia / Ethiopian Securities Exchange
industry_analysis: Newer Ethiopian banks can now reach capital markets much earlier in their lifecycle than before, which is meaningful for sector development. Competition among banks is intense, but public listing can improve governance, capital access, and investor visibility.
financial_analysis: Gadaa has a much shorter operating history than older peers, so financial quality needs to be read with more caution. Its completed ESX listing and available prospectus improve transparency, but the shorter track record argues for a more moderate business and financial score than the oldest listed banks.

assets.name: Gadaa Bank ordinary shares (GDAB)
assets.transaction_costs: Expected to run through licensed intermediaries with brokerage, exchange, and custody-related charges depending on the provider.
assets.purchase_procedure: Open an investment account with an approved ESX trading member, complete KYC, deposit funds, and submit an order for GDAB.
assets.eligibility_requirements: Investor account and intermediary onboarding requirements.

sources.title: ESX profile for Gadaa Bank Share Company

name: Bunna Insurance S.C.
industry_analysis: Insurance remains one of the next likely sectors for Ethiopia's capital market broadening, especially as ESX has been actively engaging insurers in 2026. Firms with recurring underwriting operations and investable balance sheets could become future listings or institutional market participants.
financial_analysis: Bunna provides annual reports on its official site, which is useful for future structured extraction. In this draft pass, the existence of current annual reports and its regulated status support inclusion, but valuation remains unverified because no public trading venue was confirmed.

assets.name: Bunna Insurance shareholding interest
assets.transaction_costs: Likely to include transfer documentation, approval steps, and any legal or intermediary fees involved in private transactions.
assets.purchase_procedure: Confirm transferability with the company, verify shareholder documentation, and process the transfer under company and legal requirements.
assets.eligibility_requirements: Buyer identity and transfer approvals may apply.

sources.title: ESX insurance information session
sources.excerpt: ESX reported on March 9, 2026 that it held an information session with insurance companies on listing and OTC opportunities.

name: Zemen Insurance S.C.
industry_analysis: Insurance is still earlier than banking in Ethiopia's public-market development, but the sector is institutionally important and increasingly visible to ESX as a future issuer and investor base. Competitive intensity is meaningful, yet regulatory licensing and capital requirements still provide barriers to entry.
financial_analysis: Zemen is a relatively young insurer, and public market data is limited. Its official site provides establishment history, branch growth, and high-level balance sheet figures, which supports a cautious but positive early assessment rather than a high-conviction score.

assets.name: Zemen Insurance shareholding interest
assets.transaction_costs: Costs depend on transfer approval, legal documentation, and any intermediary support used for private transactions.
assets.purchase_procedure: Verify whether shares are transferable, confirm company register or certificate evidence, complete KYC and transfer documentation, and follow company-approved procedures.
assets.eligibility_requirements: Buyer identity and company approval requirements may apply.
